indexPage.plansSubtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business

faqs.q: Do I need to know how to code?
faqs.a: No. Nexsell generates all content ready to use. Just describe your product and AI does the rest.

faqs.q: What language are landings generated in?
faqs.a: All landings are generated in optimized ecommerce copy, with prices in your country's currency.

faqs.q: Can I try without creating an account?
faqs.a: Yes. You can generate 1 demo landing without signing up. To export or download you need to create an account.

faqs.q: How many landings can I generate?
faqs.a: It depends on your plan: Free (1), Starter (10), Pro (100). Each plan has additional persuasion features.

faqs.q: Can I edit the landing afterwards?
faqs.a: Yes. Once generated you can edit the text blocks and adjust the content to your liking.

faqs.q: How do I upload my landing to Shopify?
faqs.a: Export the generated HTML, go to your Shopify panel → Online Store → Pages → Add page, paste the code and publish. Done in 2 minutes!
